title: Contact Discovery Record
description: The result of attempting to find a public contact route for one company. Designed so that 'no contact found' is a first-class, graceful outcome (role-only targeting), never a reason to invent data.

target_role.description: Role to address (e.g., 'Head of Sales'). When no person is found, outreach is addressed to the role/department only.

person_found.description: True only if a named person was found on a PUBLIC company source. If false, address the role only — never invent a name.

person_name.description: Only set when person_found is true and backed by a public source.

channels_found.description: channel_id references into contact_channels data. Empty array is valid (handled gracefully).
